mentions.note: Premium heart device leader cut in half; now 14x earnings with mediocre growth. Multiple compression reflects market repricing of legacy medtech versus AI infrastructure.
Down almost 50% from highs; primary product failed in weak quarter; medical device sector deeply troubled.
Hit new lows despite quality; Cramer confused by fall, won't sell but can't buy more.
Competition got too strong; always one step ahead of posse, now caught. Wait to see stock bottom before buying.
